subject: WM-0091 review: verified
body: No blocking findings. Verified Electron settings remain nodeIntegration=false/contextIsolation=true/sandbox=true; preload surface is typed by preload-contract and runtime-checked by desktop-shell e2e; diagnostics remain absent and storage methods remain placeholder allowlist only; no generic fs/shell/ipcRenderer/arbitrary IPC, process/require, local path/secret/full-save leakage, dependency, installer/signing/updater/store/M7 scope, or save-interoperability overclaim. Required checks pass.
